subject: [PATCH 1/3] nfsd: fix CB_NOTIFY workqueue loop when queue overflows

2026-06-17.patch_summary: This patch fixes a workqueue loop issue in the NFS server when the event queue overflows. When the queue is full, the prepare function would jump to the recall path without draining the queue, causing the release operation to requeue the callback indefinitely. The patch drains the queued events and resets the event count before recalling, preventing the requeue and fixing an event reference leak. Additionally, it guards against a revoked delegation on the release side, avoiding unnecessary notifications and pinning of the state ID.
